ticker.no_prices: No watchlist prices yet — ask in Live Market or refresh the briefing.

dashboard.subtitle: BI intelligence, standards search, live market pricing, and an AI copilot — all in one glass dashboard.
dashboard.no_rag_matches: No matches. Upload standards in the Standards tab to enable semantic search.
dashboard.rag_hint: Semantic search across your indexed steel standards.

bi.upload_hint: Columns: Date, Customer, Rebar Grade, Tonnage, Unit Price, Status, Conversion
bi.empty_state: Upload a sales sheet to compute KPIs, charts, and a records preview.

chat.title: AI Sales Copilot
chat.subtitle: Context-aware · standards RAG + market notebook briefing
chat.placeholder: Ask about specs, prices, margins, or strategy…
chat.empty_response: I couldn't generate a response. Please try again.
chat.suggestion_1: What are the yield strength specs for ASTM A615 Grade 60?
chat.suggestion_2: Summarize the latest Market Notebook briefing
chat.suggestion_3: Draft a sales strategy for Southern regional contractors
chat.suggestion_4: How do I improve my deal profit margins?
chat.initial_message_en: Hi! I'm your Iraj Sales Copilot. Ask me about steel standards, live market intelligence, deal margins, or sales strategy — I can also help draft contracts and roadmaps.
chat.initial_message_fa: سلام! من دستیار فروش ایرج هستم. درباره استانداردهای فولادی، هوش بازار زنده، حاشیه سود معاملات یا استراتژی فروش از من بپرسید — همچنین می‌توانم در تنظیم قراردادها و نقشه راه کمک کنم.

market.notebook_subtitle: Ask in normal language — Fast or Deep research. Sources are optional; Sonar Pro covers the live web.
market.sources_optional: Optional grounding — ask works with zero sources.
market.no_sources: No private sources yet. Web research still works.
market.empty_ask_body: No sources required. Add Telegram, PDFs, Excel, screenshots, or competitor lists anytime to improve accuracy.
market.ask_placeholder: e.g. What is today’s A3 Ø14 rebar price in Iran?
market.suggest_1: What is today’s rebar A3 Ø14 price?
market.suggest_2: Summarize steel market news affecting Iran
market.suggest_3: Compare my sources to live web prices
market.suggest_4: What should I quote a contractor this week?
market.studio_empty: Run Fast/Deep research or refresh to generate a briefing.
market.vs_internal_desc: Compare market prices to your BI average sale price with an explicit FX rate.
market.agent_unavailable: Market agent API is unavailable. Redeploy the backend with Live Market Intelligence routes.
market.backend_mismatch_body: This UI needs /api/market/ask, /briefing, and /sources on the API server. Redeploy the Railway backend from main after merging Market Intelligence.
market.upload_bi_first: Upload a sales sheet in BI first
market.paste_placeholder: Paste prices, catalog text, or notes…
market.upload_hint: Click Add to choose a file (PDF, Excel/CSV, or screenshot).
market.upload_bi_first_legacy: Upload a sales sheet in BI first

standards.upload_hint: DIN, ASTM, JIS, SAE, GB/T, BS — index multiple files
standards.select_grade_first: Select or enter a grade first
standards.no_standards: No standards indexed yet. Upload files above to enable semantic search.
standards.search_placeholder: e.g. DIN 488 yield strength, ASTM A615 chemical composition
standards.no_matches: No matches in the indexed standards.
standards.results_hint: Results appear here after a query.
standards.datasheet_disclaimer: Compiled exclusively from your RAG index — no fabricated specs
standards.spec_not_available: Specification not available for "{grade}". Upload the relevant standard to enable datasheet generation.

sales.buyer_seller_required: Buyer and seller names are required
sales.contract_empty: Fill in the details and generate a contract draft.
sales.company_market_required: Company and target market are required
sales.roadmap_empty: Enter your company and target market to compile a roadmap.

calculator.loss: This deal runs at a loss at the current inputs.

dropzone.default_label: Drop file here or click to upload

metadata.title: Iraj Sales AI — Command Center
metadata.description: Production multi-agent command center for steel rebar sales: BI & KPIs, standards RAG, live market pricing, contracts, and an AI copilot.
